segments.text: That's different—and there's a KO off Ray Wing!
segments.original_text: 違うのは、おっとここはレイビルウィング撃墜が入りました

segments.text: The difference is that it has that terrifying level of danger to it
segments.original_text: 違うのは地獄の怖さがあるというところですかね
そうなんですよね、こんな感じで

segments.text: With Cloud, recovery options really get limited
segments.original_text: クラウドだと本当に復帰ルートが少なくなるので

segments.text: It was risky, but they managed to pull it off
segments.original_text: 危なかったんですけれども、なんとかですね

segments.text: This is heading to the outside

full_text: That's different—and there's a KO off Ray Wing! The difference is that it has that terrifying level of danger to it Yeah, exactly, like this With Cloud, recovery options really get limited It was risky, but they managed to pull it off Yeah, that's right This is heading to the outside

corrections.corrected: 復帰ルートが少なくなる
